prompt: Complete using the correct present simple form of the verbs in the box: arrive, come, leave, take.
explanation: Timetabled events use the present simple: the plane leaves, we arrive, we take the train, we come back.
passageTemplate: "I'm so excited about my holiday! My plane {{blank-1}} the airport here at nine o'clock and we {{blank-2}} in Paris two hours later. We then {{blank-3}} the train from the airport to the city. We'll have a great week, and then we {{blank-4}} back on the 17th. I can't wait!"
